query: query getCalendarEvents($startDate: String, $endDate: String, $regionType: String, $limit: Int, $offset: Int, $competitionGroupId: Int) { getCalendarEvents(startDate: $startDate, endDate: $endDate, regionType: $regionType, limit: $limit, offset: $offset, competitionGroupId: $competitionGroupId) { results { id name dateRange venue area rankingCategory disciplines competitionGroup competitionSubgroup hasResults } } }
